summary: Testing iteration 38: Multi-tenant data isolation bug fix verification. All tests passed (22/22). CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Products and customers are now properly isolated between tenants using ContextVar + DB Proxy pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: ContextVar + _TenantDBProxy pattern correctly isolates tenant data at the database level
Middleware at line 10835-10850 properly extracts tenant_id from JWT and sets ContextVar
main_db is correctly used for SaaS management tables (saas_tenants, saas_plans, saas_agents)
Super Admin correctly sees only main_db products, not tenant-specific products
get_tenant_db() helper function properly creates tenant-specific database names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant data isolation is fully functional. Login via POST /api/auth/unified-login. Tenant users get user_type='tenant' with tenant_id in token. Super Admin gets user_type='admin' with no tenant_id. The _TenantDBProxy automatically routes db.* calls to tenant-specific databases when ContextVar is set by middleware.

saas_tenants_access.notes: Super Admin can access SaaS management routes

super_admin_product_isolation.notes: Super Admin sees main_db products only, NOT tenant products

tenant_a_product_list.notes: Tenant A sees only their own products

tenant_b_product_list.notes: Tenant B sees only their own products

tenant_a_to_b_product_isolation.notes: Tenant A CANNOT see Tenant B's products - DATA ISOLATION WORKING

tenant_b_to_a_product_isolation.notes: Tenant B CANNOT see Tenant A's products - DATA ISOLATION WORKING

new_product_isolation.notes: Newly created product by Tenant A is NOT visible to Tenant B

customer_isolation.notes: Customers are properly isolated between tenants

new_customer_isolation.notes: Newly created customer by Tenant A is NOT visible to Tenant B

architecture_notes.main_db_usage: SaaS tables (saas_tenants, saas_plans, saas_agents, users for super admin)
